pi_items.source: Analyzed SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repository; the file contains 29 distinct <dive> elements. The setup_task.sh script iterates over and modifies all 29 dives, contradicting the claim of 8.
Analyzed setup_task.sh which explicitly modifies 'buddy' and 'divemaster' attributes in the XML data.

privileged_info_summary: The logbook data originates from the official Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf file. Despite the task description and metadata claiming there are 8 dives, the file actually contains 29 dive records. The setup_task.sh script synthetically populates the 'buddy' and 'divemaster' XML attributes for all 29 dives with fake names using a round-robin assignment. An agent must clear these specific attributes across all 29 dives to fully anonymize the dataset.
